=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 11/6/03, Frankfurt, 2CDR

watchtower/Jonathan remaster of Schubert recording; 

CD1
1 intro 2 Down Along The Cove (Bob on piano), 3 It's All Over Now, Baby Blue, (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel, Freddy on electric guitar, Tony on electric bass), 4 Cry A While (Bob on piano and harp), 5 Love Minus Zero/No Limit, (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel, Freddy on acoustic guitar), 6 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (Bob on piano, Larry on cittern), 7 Simple Twist Of Fate (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel), 8 Things Have Changed (Bob on piano), 9 Moonlight (Bob on piano and harp, Tony on standup bass), 10 Man In The Long Black Coat, (Bob on piano, Larry on acoustic guitar, Freddy on electric guitar), 

CD2
1 Highway 61 Revisited (Bob on piano), 2 Every Grain Of Sand (Bob on piano and harp), 3 Honest With Me (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar), 4 Mr. Tambourine Man (Bob on piano and harp, Larry and Freddy on electric guitars), 5 Summer Days (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass), 6 (encore), Cat's In The Well (Bob on piano), 7 Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano), 8 All Along The Watchtower (Bob on piano and harp)
